notes:
Added a new animated opening screen with welcome text, spinner, hints, logo effects, and smooth transition into the app.

Added notification sounds for toast and leak alerts.
Improved Discord Presence, including upload status and Join 6ure support.

Redesigned the main leak uploader UI with a cleaner dark theme.
Moved Cloud, Protected, Update, Open Site, Log out, and account info into a hover sidebar.

Updated the account badge to show the avatar when collapsed and avatar + username when expanded.

Moved selected leak folders into the browse/drop area and removed the separate folder path box.

Improved Cloud Manager speed and responsiveness.
Replaced browser-style WebView prompts with custom animated in-app dialogs.

Added a custom connection error screen instead of the default WebView error page.

Changed the import button into an icon-only upload button with built-in progress fill animation.

Cleared editor name and selected leak folders on app restart while keeping sign-in saved.

Fixed opening sound timing, transition smoothness, sidebar avatar alignment, and several UI polish issues.
